name: Jura Neekis
description:
Race: Human (X784), 34 (X791)
Birthday: Year X757
~!Affiliation: Magic Council - Ten Wizard Saints
Previous Affiliation: Lamia scale
Occupation:Mage, Wizard Saint!~
Magic: Earth Magic
Weapons: Staff
Down-to-earth and with great humility, Jura generally refers to others with the highly honorific suffix "-dono", even when addressing subordinates, enemies, animals (Even despite not knowing Happy's name, he once called him Cat-dono), and those weaker than he is.
